title: lonchocarpus neuroscapha var. pubiger
intro: Lonchocarpus neuroscapha var. pubiger is a plant species, also known as the Mexican "palo blanco", that belongs to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus neuroscapha var. pubiger include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied.
